name: HMS Medusa (FY 018)
events: 23 Feb 1941 HMS Sunfish (Lt. G.R. Colvin, RN) departed Blyth for Scapa Flow. She was escorted by HMS Mollusc (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) R.H. Aldworth, RN) until 0440/24 when HMS Brilliant (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Brodrick, RN) took over the escort. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
